{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201239289F014954AEF8D2021C55"}"},"total":4304},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7115953918609507113","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这应该是我目前迄今为止看过最好看的一篇文，特别喜欢主角的性格，杀伐果断，丝毫不拖泥带水，而且配角的人物塑造和性格也很有特点，关键是无女主，特别对我的口味，男主智商在线，总之，值得一看，作者大大加油，继续更哦[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656812190,"group_id":"7069030068390988807","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1JEtZiAdcSMLH/kkIZ4o7M=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ec0388d01f444cc5a960487e2c99e8b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534634&x-signature=103crmEEjlx8XbAyHJX4qtzQlgY%3D","user_id":"228290404810943","user_name":"饭饱煲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"228290404810943","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1694334920,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7069030068390988807","book_info":{"abstract":"原名《无上大尊》
万年前，异魔族入侵天启大陆，身为人族无上的陆南灼率万族迎击，后在大战中不知所踪。
万年后，一袭白衣自北玄洲而出，游历世间，一路无敌！
他淡然，随性，霸道！
他纵意天地间，无敌于寰宇！
他高高在上宛若神明，一言可轻易定人生死！
“本尊，陆南灼！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ocd6a87e14915980c7d04536ac112bf2e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"无欲的酒","author_id":"","book_id":"7069030068390988807","book_name":"本尊都无敌了，还升什么级？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7069053077822636548","read_count":"28571","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1096785"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"507","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,无敌,无女主,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8c705204ebe5f839cabc0c0d4a9e39c4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779165568&x-signature=%2FWmm6ycuUCTJ1QjwDYS0CJ4Dw0k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"50894542199","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.4653777e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201239289F014954AEF8D2021C55"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":135,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24788,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":81305},"user_action":
